summary: Iteration 31: Comprehensive testing of landing page redesign, step restructuring, and admin delete functionality. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Partners API returns correct tags (Antragstellung, Kenntnisprüfung, Weiterbildung)
BACKEND: Landing page partner filter excludes Praxis partners (8 partners shown, no Praxis)
BACKEND: Steps API returns 12 active steps
BACKEND: Steps have correct order and names (1-Persönliche Daten through 12-Du hast dich nun beworben!)
BACKEND: FaMed step (order 4) is display type with link_url
BACKEND: Gleichwertigkeitspruefung partners exist (IQB Pruefungszentrum, MedAkademie Berlin)
BACKEND: Admin can create and delete partner (TEST_DeletePartner created and deleted)
BACKEND: Admin can create and delete step (TEST_DeleteStep created and deleted)
BACKEND: User estimated completion API works (returns date)
BACKEND: Total partners count is 19+
FRONTEND: Landing page hero image loads (Emergent static image with doctors)
FRONTEND: Logo shows 'by digiFORT' in header
FRONTEND: Hero headline is 'GERdoctor - dein persoenlicher Weg zum Facharzt in Deutschland'
FRONTEND: Hero badge shows '100%' and 'Der schnellste Weg zur Approbation'
FRONTEND: Footer shows 'by digiFORT'
FRONTEND: Partner section shows 8 partners (only Antragstellung/Kenntnisprüfung/Weiterbildung tags)
FRONTEND: Admin dashboard shows 19 partner delete buttons
FRONTEND: Admin dashboard shows 12 step delete buttons
FRONTEND: User header shows date (25.09.2026) without 'Abschluss' text
FRONTEND: User header has tooltip 'Voraussichtliche Approbation'
FRONTEND: 12 step cards visible in user dashboard
FRONTEND: FaMed step shows link button 'famed-test.de besuchen' with href to https://famed-test.de/
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / Admin123!, User: dr.kumar@gerdoctor.de / Demo123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 complete. All features verified: (1) Landing page redesigned with German medical hero image (Emergent static), 'by digiFORT' branding in header and footer, new headline 'GERdoctor - dein persoenlicher Weg zum Facharzt in Deutschland', 100% badge with 'Der schnellste Weg zur Approbation'. (2) Partner section filters to show only Antragstellung/Kenntnisprüfung/Weiterbildung partners (8 shown, Praxis excluded). (3) Admin delete partner/step buttons work - tested via API create+delete. (4) User header shows estimated completion date without 'Abschluss' text, tooltip is 'Voraussichtliche Approbation'. (5) 12 steps in correct order: 1-Persönliche Daten, 2-Antragstellung Approbation, 3-Uebersicht Antragstellung Approbation, 4-FaMed, 5-Gleichwertigkeitspruefung, 6-Uebersicht Gleichwertigkeitspruefung, 7-Service Kenntnisprüfung, 8-Meilenstein Kenntnisprüfung, 9-Service Weiterbildung, 10-Meilenstein Job finden, 11-Jobangebote, 12-Du hast dich nun beworben! (6) FaMed step has link_url to famed-test.de with button 'famed-test.de besuchen'. (7) 2 Gleichwertigkeitspruefung partners: IQB Pruefungszentrum, MedAkademie Berlin.

features_verified.admin_delete_partner: PASS - Delete buttons visible, API tested
features_verified.admin_delete_step: PASS - Delete buttons visible, API tested
features_verified.total_12_steps: PASS - 12 active steps in correct order
